aboutme.title: About Me
aboutme.description: Senior Full-stack developer with 5+ years of experience designing scalable systems in Angular, .NET, and mobile technologies, specializing in scalable REST APIs and CI/CD pipelines. Proven leadership in Agile teams, mentoring junior developers, and driving architectural decisions.

contact.title: Contact Me
contact.description: I am always open to discussing new projects, creative ideas, or opportunities to be part of your visions.
